attestation_note: Three errors corrected: (1) removed employment type 'full-time' for UXStone — was not full-time; (2) removed 'problem_solved' field for banking services achievement — reason for problem was not stated in original resume, agent fabricated it; (3) removed 'problem_solved: Manual parcel processing inefficiency' for OCR project — cause of problem was not stated in original resume, agent added it from inference. SQL skill was missing from resume despite being a real skill — added during this exercise.

achievements.description: Implemented credit aggregator from idea to launch
achievements.impact: Increased super app revenue by 5% in first month post-launch
